Submarine Telecom Project Application — Standalone Demo
=======================================================

HOW TO OPEN (no install, no server, no login):

  1. Unzip this file.
  2. Double-click  STP-Application.html
  3. It opens in your web browser, straight into the app.

That's it. It works offline. For the live 3D Network Map you just need a
modern browser (Chrome, Edge, Firefox, or Safari) with WebGL enabled.

WHAT THIS IS
  A single, self-contained copy of the Submarine Telecom Project Application
  front-end, for viewing and demos. Everything (code, 3D engine, Earth
  textures) is embedded in the one HTML file. It deliberately has NO login
  because it has NO backend — nothing here can reach your real data.

YOUR SECURE, PRIVATE DEPLOYMENT IS SEPARATE
  The real system for you and the 10 other project owners runs the
  login-gated, server-backed stack (docker-compose) with the full security:
  user accounts + passwords (Argon2id), two-factor authentication (TOTP +
  recovery codes), CSRF protection, session revocation, role-based access,
  tenant isolation and audit logging. That deployment is unchanged.
